creator: omar@heedme.com
text: Please update my freebsd commercial consultants entry that is here (listed under "Omar Siddique"): http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult.html as follows: Omar Siddique is a Washington, D.C. based consultant with broad experience in FreeBSD, Linux, Solaris. His specialties include internet services, systems integration, system administration, and networking. Contact him via omar@heedme.com ------------------------------------------- I also noticed, though I don't know if it's linked from anywhere, that the old listings (probably now obsolete?) are still available (in google/etc), eg: http://www.pl.freebsd.org/commercial/consulting.html#LETTER_O It might be worthwhile blowing those away and replacing them with a redirect to the current stuff. thanks, -omar
